backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a snack ordering system with catalog management, shopping cart operations, and order checkout functionality using Map-based storage and blob storage for product images.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the admin interface with image upload capability for managing snack items, listing involved files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the React application structure, including routing, state management, UI components, and the admin panel with image upload functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining design tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color system with custom CSS variables for colors, borders, and spacing.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport configuration and title "Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go".
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for catalog, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and admin pages, wrapped with ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item display component showing product thumbnail, name, price, quantity, and calculated subtotal in a card layout.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Reusable image upload component handling file selection, preview display, conversion to Uint8Array format, and upload progress tracking with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header containing logo, business name, admin and cart navigation buttons with item count badge, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying snack item details with image, price, quantity selector, and add-to-cart button with loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: React hook that generates and persists a unique user ID in localStorage for cart management, creating a new ID if one doesn't exist.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching snack items, managing cart (get, add), checkout, fetching orders, and adding new snack items with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm food truck color theme (orange/yellow/red palette) for both light and dark modes, plus font imports for Poppins and Pacifico.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page component with a form to add new snack items (ID, name, description, price, image) and displays existing inventory using backend mutations and queries.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities, calculates totals, and provides navigation to checkout or back to menu when empty.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a form for customer information (name, email, address) that submits orders and navigates to order confirmation upon success.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays order confirmation page with customer details, order items, and total amount after successful checkout. Shows loading state, handles missing orders, and provides navigation back to menu.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Main product catalog page displaying hero banner, food truck image, and grid of snack items using ProductCard components. Includes loading states and empty state messaging.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors (using OKLCH), typography (Poppins and Pacifico fonts), animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting completed features (product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, mobile-first UI, branding, admin interface) and pending feature requests for image upload functionality.
